description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/oer/docker/debian-emacs-tex-org:v1.0 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In the pages job's before_script run git submodule sync --recursive and git submodule update --init --recursive. Then execute emacs --batch --load elisp/publish.el --funcall org-publish-all. Publish the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after one week.
